gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, updating the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recent community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community creations and announcements.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot and the bee mascot updating a giant billboard or notice board. The robot is holding a fresh poster.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot pinning a new paper to a wooden notice board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot pinning a new paper to a wooden notice board.
